expectations.evidence: 'Hold up — can't run the phase gate yet' and 'phase gate refuses to advance on a dirty phase file-set'

expectations.text: Instructs user to commit first (mentions git add or git commit)
expectations.evidence: 'git add internal/shortener/shortener.go internal/shortener/shortener_test.go && git commit -m "impl: phase 1 practice TODOs (p1-t1..p1-t5)"'

expectations.text: Does NOT claim phase is done or run go test as primary action
expectations.evidence: Tests explicitly sequenced AFTER commit ('3. Run go test ./...'). Does not run tests this turn.

expectations.text: Keeps skill in coach mode (no claim of phase advance or build transition)
expectations.evidence: 'I'm staying in coach mode — no state changes this turn beyond noting the blocked-gate event'
